# Getting the Helium App (iOS, Android, and Web)

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000426994

Helium is available as a native app for iOS and Android, and also runs in any modern web browser. Your data syncs automatically across all platforms.

## iOS (iPhone and iPad)

  1. Open the **[App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/helium-student-planner/id6758323154)** on your iPhone or iPad
  2. Search for **Helium – Student Planner**
  3. Tap **Get** to install
  4. Open the app and sign in to your existing account, or create a new one

## Android (Phone and Tablet)

  1. Open the **[Google Play Store](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.heliumedu.heliumapp)** on your Android device
  2. Search for **Helium – Student Planner**
  3. Tap **Install**
  4. Open the app and sign in to your existing account, or create a new one

## Web

No installation is required to use Helium in a browser. Visit [**app.heliumedu.com**](https://app.heliumedu.com) and sign in from any device.

## Signing In on a New Device

When you sign in on a new device, all your classes, assignments, grades, and settings load automatically. There is no manual sync step required.

## Related Articles

  * [Signing In with Google or Apple](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000426995)
  * [Resetting Your Password](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418671)

---

## Helium Classic

Helium Classic is a web-only experience and does not have dedicated iOS or Android apps. It is accessible in a browser at [**heliumedu.com**](https://www.heliumedu.com).

__Helium Classic will remain available until July 31, 2026.__
